overall.description: Gameplay footage from Marvel's Spider-Man: Miles Morales showing the character wearing a Santa hat web-swinging through a snow-covered Manhattan during sunset. The sequence includes wall-running, wall-crawling up skyscrapers, and high-speed aerial traversal between buildings with the Empire State Building visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered art deco rooftop with stone pillars

events.description: lands on snowy rooftop after falling alongside skyscraper

agents.ego_description: falling down the side of a skyscraper and landing on a snowy rooftop

entered.detail: tall building with dark glass facade being descended
distant cityscape visible in the background
rooftop with art deco architectural details and snow
classic wooden water tower on adjacent building

segments.scene_description: The sequence begins with Spider-Man falling alongside a dark glass skyscraper in a snowy Manhattan. Flying drones appear briefly in the distance before the character lands on an art deco rooftop covered in snow, featuring stone pillars and a nearby water tower.

events.description: launches off rooftop and begins web-swinging between buildings
transitions from swinging to wall-running on glass facade

agents.ego_description: web-swinging between buildings and running vertically along glass walls

entered.detail: skyscraper with highly reflective glass showing sunset colors
iconic spire visible in the distance against the sunset

segments.scene_description: Launching off the rooftop, the character swings through the open air between skyscrapers. The Empire State Building becomes visible in the distance as the sun sets. The character transitions to wall-running along a highly reflective glass building that mirrors the warm sunset colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical glass facade of skyscraper with sunset reflection

events.description: begins crawling up the glass building surface using spider abilities
reaches higher altitude revealing twin modern towers and expanded city view

agents.ego_description: climbing up the glass skyscraper while observing the city skyline and distant landmarks

entered.detail: pair of matching modern glass skyscrapers visible from high altitude

segments.scene_description: The character crawls up the vertical glass facade, with the sunset creating brilliant orange and pink reflections on the windows. As altitude increases, twin modern towers come into view alongside the Empire State Building, showcasing the expansive winter cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: open air above city streets transitioning to street canyon

events.description: jumps off the skyscraper and begins diving rapidly toward street level
dives through tree canopy at street level before swinging back upward

agents.ego_description: diving down from skyscraper height and recovering with web-swing near street level

entered.detail: narrow street between tall buildings visible from above
snow-covered deciduous trees at street level

segments.scene_description: Leaping off the skyscraper, the character enters a rapid dive toward the streets below, passing the Empire State Building. The descent continues through a canopy of bare winter trees at street level before recovering momentum with a web-swing back up into the aerial space between buildings.

events.description: briefly lands on building edge before continuing to swing

agents.ego_description: rapidly traversing the city through continuous web-swinging between buildings

entered.detail: various midtown office buildings passing by during traversal

segments.scene_description: The final sequence shows high-speed traversal through the midtown skyline, with the character swinging between various office buildings. The sun sets in the background casting a warm glow over the snow-covered city as the character briefly touches down on a building edge before continuing the aerial journey.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a descent alongside a dark skyscraper and evolves into a high-speed aerial journey across a snow-covered Manhattan at sunset. It begins with Spider-Man falling past a glass facade before landing on a snowy art deco rooftop featuring stone pillars and a water tower. As the character launches back into the air, the scene opens up to reveal the Empire State Building against a setting sun, transitioning from open-air swinging to a wall-run along a reflective glass building that mirrors warm orange and pink hues. The camera then climbs vertically up the facade toward a panoramic view of twin modern towers and the expansive winter cityscape before plunging into a rapid dive past the Empire State Building and through a canopy of bare winter trees at street level. Finally, the momentum shifts back upward into a high-speed traversal through the midtown skyline, swinging between office buildings under a warm golden glow.
